title: Bulk write on sharded collection without chunk migration awareness
expected_feedback: Standard: Unbounded updateMany on a 30M-document sharded collection during peak hours. Two problems: (1) the update fans out to all shards simultaneously, consuming write tickets on every shard — reducing capacity for application writes cluster-wide. (2) No consideration for chunk balancer — if the balancer is active during this bulk write, chunk migrations compete with the update for I/O and locks, causing unpredictable latency. Fix: batch by _id range, pause balancer during bulk operations (sh.stopBalancer()), and resume after completion. Monitor per-shard replication lag during the backfill.
